_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the handoff skill, PICKUP scenario. See spec.json for the planner/lens-4 split rationale. The prompt carries a list-verb task directive (`start the named workflow`) that bypasses the chunker plus pickup wording (`resume`), so `plan_handoff_run.py` deterministically resolves intent=pickup, whose planner _required_reads are workflow-trigger.md + continuation-sequence.md (the RCF). Every other reference is on-demand here (read under a different intent or condition). declaredReferences is the full set (coverage). referenceEngagement uses the engage-always/on-demand/gate-sufficient axis from the methodology contract (charness-artifacts/spec/2026-06-23-skill-claim-fidelity-doc-philosophy.md). thresholds omitted until a baseline capture sets a budget. SLICE 7 (2026-07-01) CAPTURE — workflow-trigger.md PROVEN load-bearing (opened), so #410's 'drop workflow-trigger.md -> RSF' is REFUTED. But continuation-sequence.md was NOT opened: the pickup was unambiguous (one clear pinned task), and continuation-sequence.md is for 'when several plausible pickups exist' (SKILL.md). plan_handoff_run.py UNCONDITIONALLY emits continuation-sequence.md for the pickup intent, so this RCF mirrors the planner and the eval correctly FLAGS the gap — a PLANNER over-requirement finding (filed follow-up), NOT a spec softening. RCF is KEPT planner-faithful (this scenario's floor legitimately fails until the planner conditionalizes continuation-sequence.md). document-seams.md removed + deleted (DUP).
prompt: /charness:handoff resume the pinned task from the current state and start the named workflow before doing anything else

adapter-contract.md.rationale: The planner reads this only when the adapter is missing, warned, or invalid; a healthy repo resolves the artifact location from the resolved adapter without opening the explainer doc.
adapter-contract.md.trigger: adapter is missing, warned, or invalid (planner _required_reads condition)

chunked-routing.md.rationale: A chunked_routing-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run that carries a task directive.
chunked-routing.md.trigger: bare/namespaced invocation with no task directive — route the backlog before pickup

continuation-sequence.md.rationale: A pickup-intent UNCONDITIONAL planner required read: orders the next move as continuation (dependency sequencing) rather than replaying history.

spill-targets.md.rationale: A refresh-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run.
spill-targets.md.trigger: refresh intent — spilling durable detail to its owning artifact instead of growing a diary

state-selection.md.rationale: A refresh/judge-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run.
state-selection.md.trigger: refresh intent — keeping only state that changes the next action

workflow-trigger.md.rationale: A pickup-intent UNCONDITIONAL planner required read: a pickup starts from the named workflow trigger, so the run must consult this to invoke the next workflow directly rather than infer it.
